qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: attribute_filter security boundary bypass via python.eval() allows arbitrary Python code execution from Lua sandbox
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the same Lua-visible python.builtins.getattr attribute_filter bypass for protected Python attributes; the copied PoC demonstrates the advisory's getattr/setattr object-graph traversal with python.eval disabled.

selected_finding.title: attribute_filter security boundary bypass via python.eval() allows arbitrary Python code execution from Lua sandbox

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected qualifying finding matches the advisory root cause, and the copied runtime PoC shows direct filtered access being blocked, python.builtins.getattr bypassing the filter, and an advisory-style getattr/setattr traversal reaching os.system to execute an attacker-controlled command.
evidence: /Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_99679a28/attribute_filter_bypass/vulnerability_report.json identifies attribute_filter enforcement only on direct Lua-Python attribute access and notes python.builtins.getattr bypassing that filter.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_99679a28/.judge/poc_runs/attribute_filter_bypass/adapted_exploit_source.py records the copied PoC adaptation with register_eval=False and an advisory getattr/setattr traversal through __class__, __mro__, __subclasses__, __globals__, and os.system.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_99679a28/.judge/poc_runs/attribute_filter_bypass/run.log shows direct obj.__class__ access blocked, python.builtins.getattr(obj, '__class__') bypassing the filter, and marker EVOHUNT_POC_SUCCESS_99679a28 printed by the OS command reached through the advisory chain.

poc_executions.command: bash -lc 'python3 -m venv .workdir/venv && source .workdir/venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && python -m pip install --no-input lupa==2.6 && python reproduction/exploit.py'
poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC installed lupa==2.6, verified attribute_filter blocked direct obj.__class__ access, verified python.builtins.getattr(obj, '__class__') bypassed the filter, and printed EVOHUNT_POC_SUCCESS_99679a28 from an OS command reached through the retained advisory getattr/setattr chain with python.eval disabled.
